title: Be explicit and consistent about frames
description: Tag every pose and measurement with its coordinate frame and timestamp, and transform through tf2 rather than assuming a common frame.
body: Use whenever combining poses, sensor readings, or commands that live in different frames. Do not assume two measurements share a frame, and avoid transforming with a transform from a different time than the data. Actions: stamp every message with frame_id and time, look up the transform between frames at the data's timestamp via tf2, and keep the transform tree fully connected with a single root. Validation signals include a connected tf tree with no missing links and a test that transformed poses match a known ground-truth pose. Risk boundary: combining data across mismatched frames or times sends the robot to the wrong place; treat a frame or timestamp mismatch on a motion path as a correctness-and-safety defect.
